explainers.title: How to adopt AI work tools inside the apps your team already uses
explainers.description: A practical guide to using AI inside the documents, spreadsheets, design tools, chat apps and project boards your team already uses. It explains how to choose a workflow, set review and disclosure rules, and judge whether the tool really improves finished work.
explainers.search_question: How should a team adopt AI tools inside the apps it already uses?
